nodes.label: Light Control via setRedYellowGreenState
nodes.rationale: SUMO switches TLS into a one-phase override program where setPhase(tls, 6) raises errors if an explicit state string is set. Crucial for env function.

nodes.label: Load-bearing TraCI Labels
nodes.rationale: Prevents probe and training sessions from sharing one global TraCI instance.

nodes.label: Policy Collapse under Short Training
nodes.rationale: At 5 episodes, DQN policy collapses to a single green slot and delta stops incrementing. Needs >= 20 episodes.

nodes.label: State/Action Size Mismatch Fallback
nodes.rationale: If checkpoint was trained on different layout, falls back to actuated control with fallback:state_size_mismatch.
